top_signals.title: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
top_signals.summary: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Can AI make cutlery? -  speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the 389th Cutlers’ Feast, Cutlers’ Hall, Sheffield
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal 'under protest' against the FCC
top_signals.summary: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest," after the FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Costco says it saw 'record-breaking' gas volumes amid rising prices
top_signals.summary: Costco saw "recording-breaking volumes" of gas sales and said rising fuel prices drove first-time members to its stations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
